summary: Frontend refactoring testing complete - WarehousesTab.jsx and SuppliersTab.jsx extraction verified successful. All 7 features tested passed. InventoryManager.js reduced from 2823 to 2539 lines (-284 lines, total reduction from 4503 to 2539 = -44%).

issues: Console warning: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility improvement recommended (minor)

passed_tests: Tab de Almacenes loads correctly - WarehousesTab component with data-testid='warehouses-tab'
Tab de Almacenes shows existing warehouses: Almacen Principal (4 items, 2 bajo stock), Barra (1 item)
Botón 'Nuevo Almacén' (data-testid='add-warehouse-btn') opens dialog with name and location inputs
Tab de Proveedores loads correctly - SuppliersTab component with data-testid='suppliers-tab'
Tab de Proveedores shows 3 existing suppliers: Distribuidora Nacional, Mariscos del Caribe, Bebidas Nacionales SRL
Botón 'Nuevo Proveedor' (data-testid='add-supplier-btn') opens dialog with all fields
Other tabs still work: Insumos (IngredientsTab), Producción (ProductionTab), Recetas, Stock (multilevel table)
critical_code_review_comments: WarehousesTab.jsx (165 lines) properly extracts warehouse CRUD from parent component
SuppliersTab.jsx (189 lines) properly extracts supplier CRUD from parent component
Both components receive minimal props: data arrays + onRefreshAll callback
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
Dialog state management is self-contained within each component
InventoryManager.js now cleanly imports and renders both extracted components

features_tested: Warehouses grid with cards showing name, location, item count, low stock count
Edit/Delete buttons on each warehouse card
Supplier list showing name, contact, phone, RNC
Dialog has all fields: name, contact, phone, email, rnc, address
All inputs have proper data-testid attributes
Edit/Delete buttons on each supplier row

context_for_next_testing_agent: Component extraction verified - 5 components now extracted from InventoryManager.js: IngredientsTab (~737 lines), ProductionTab (~401 lines), AssistantTab, WarehousesTab (165 lines), SuppliersTab (189 lines). Parent component reduced from 4503 to 2539 lines (-44%). All 10 inventory tabs functional. data-testid attributes in place for all interactive elements.

mocked_apis.status: No APIs are mocked - all endpoints are fully functional
